relations: Flight 19 disappeared in the Bermuda Triangle, contributing to its mystery
The USS Cyclops went missing in the Bermuda Triangle, adding to the enigma of the area
Miami is one of the vertices of the Bermuda Triangle
Bermuda is one of the vertices of the Bermuda Triangle
Puerto Rico is one of the vertices of the Bermuda Triangle
The Bermuda Triangle is also known as the Devil's Triangle, referring to the same mysterious region
The Bermuda Triangle is located in the western part of the North Atlantic Ocean
Methane hydrate destabilization is one of the scientific explanations for the mysterious disappearances in the Bermuda Triangle
Magnetic anomalies are a scientific explanation for the phenomena in the Bermuda Triangle
Compass malfunctions, resulting from magnetic anomalies, contribute to the mystery of the Bermuda Triangle
Unpredictable weather patterns, including sudden storms and rogue waves, are characteristic of the Bermuda Triangle
Sudden storms in the Bermuda Triangle could potentially explain some of the disappearances
Rogue waves in the Bermuda Triangle could potentially explain some of the disappearances
The Flight 19 crew consisted of 14 members who disappeared along with the aircraft in the Bermuda Triangle
